name: CP2K On Slurm
summary: Run CP2K calculations on Slurm with MPI/OpenMP layout and restart planning.
description: This skill provides a conservative Slurm pattern for CP2K calculations, including MPI/OpenMP layout, CP2K data file checks, generated input from a template, output and restart record keeping, and dry-run-first smoke-test controls.

tools.name: cp2k.psmp
tools.notes: Common CP2K MPI/OpenMP executable name; sites may expose cp2k.popt, cp2k, module wrappers, or container entrypoints instead.

inputs.name: input_template
inputs.description: CP2K input template with placeholders for project, basis set file, potential file, and print level.

inputs.name: cp2k_data_files
inputs.description: Basis set and potential files such as BASIS_MOLOPT and GTH_POTENTIALS, staged from a reviewed CP2K data directory.

inputs.name: cp2k_executable
inputs.description: CP2K executable or site wrapper command available in the job environment.

inputs.name: record_dir
inputs.description: Durable directory for generated input, stdout, logs, restart files, and run metadata.

outputs.name: cp2k_launch_plan
outputs.description: Reviewable Slurm, MPI/OpenMP, executable, input, data-file, output, and restart plan.

outputs.name: cp2k_generated_input
outputs.description: Rendered CP2K input file with concrete project and data-file paths.

outputs.name: cp2k_output
outputs.description: CP2K stdout output file when RUN_CP2K=1.

outputs.name: cp2k_restart_state
outputs.description: Restart, wavefunction, trajectory, or project-prefixed files needed for continuation or follow-on calculations.

examples.title: Plan or run a CP2K smoke test on Slurm

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced artifacts.
Check the Slurm wrapper shell syntax.
Run plan-only mode first; set RUN_CP2K=1 only after loading a site-approved CP2K executable and providing reviewed basis set and potential files.
